projects.title: Exterior Door Restoration – Structural Repair & Finish
projects.summary: Structural repair and restoration of an exterior door frame, preserving original elements while improving durability and finish.

cover.alt: Restored exterior door frame after structural repair and finishing

projects.title: Door Frame Restoration

cover.alt: Door frame base restored and painted, final result

projects.summary: Repair-first rebuild of a rotted door-frame base: damaged timber removed, custom insert fabricated, sealed and finished for Danish weather.
story: The client had been quoted nearly DKK 20,000 to replace the entire door frame because the base had rotted. That’s a common answer: full replacement is faster for large companies, but it also means paying to discard 95% of a frame that’s still perfectly sound.

At Fixera I follow a repair-first approach whenever it’s safe and makes sense. It’s usually more affordable, less wasteful, and just as strong. After reviewing the photos, I confirmed this frame could indeed be saved.

I carefully removed every bit of rotten wood until I reached solid timber, sealed the exposed areas against moisture, fabricated a custom insert, fixed it securely, filled and sanded the surface, and finished with an exterior-grade paint system made for Danish weather.
The result is a sturdy, aligned frame with clean lines, proper protection, and a far smaller bill than full replacement.

images.alt: Rotten wooden base of the door frame before any work started
All damaged wood removed, exposing solid timber ready for repair
Moisture sealing applied before installing the new insert
Custom insert aligned and fixed in place
Filling and sanding to achieve a smooth, continuous surface
Exterior paint applied for weather protection and uniform look
Detail of the restored and painted door-frame base
Final wide view of the restored exterior door frame

projects.title: Custom Curtain Rails & Hemming
projects.summary: Ceiling-mounted rails with a clean corner joint and hemming to get the exact floor clearance. Simple, durable and smooth to use.

cover.alt: Ceiling-mounted curtain rail with corner joint in Nørrebro

images.alt: Corner-mounted curtain rail cut and joined precisely to follow the wall geometry.
images.caption: L-shaped rail, tight corner alignment for smooth glide.

images.alt: Ceiling-mounted track providing full curtain coverage across bay window opening.
images.caption: Continuous ceiling rail above window opening.

images.alt: Curtains hemmed to achieve clean floor clearance and even bottom edge.
images.caption: Hemming for perfect length and aligned floor line.

images.alt: Ceiling brackets and anchors evenly spaced to distribute curtain load.
images.caption: Anchors and brackets placed for even weight distribution.

images.alt: Finished installation with uniform folds and effortless glide along the rail.
images.caption: Final look: full coverage and smooth glide.

story: Client had multiple options in mind. We compared rods vs rails and went for ceiling-mounted aluminum rails to get a full-height look and better light control.
Rails were cut on-site and joined in the corner; anchors spaced appropriately to avoid sagging.
Curtains were too long, so we hemmed them to sit 1–2 cm above the floor: cleaner line and smoother glide.
Tips when choosing: rails are best for tight spaces or ceiling-to-floor coverage; check fabric weight to select proper gliders; plan corner joints and a return-to-wall if you need blackout.
Client review: “Super friendly, precise work and available on short notice. My go-to for everyday fixes like closet, curtains, table leg repair and wall mounting. Highly recommend!”, Bea V.

projects.title: Gardin-skinner & oplægning
projects.summary: Loftmonterede skinner med pæn hjørnesamling og oplægning for den rette gulvafstand. En enkel, holdbar løsning med let glide.

cover.alt: Loftmonteret gardinskinne med hjørnesamling i Nørrebro

images.alt: Hjørne-monteret gardinskinne tilpasset præcist efter væggens geometri.
images.caption: L-formet skinne med præcis hjørnesamling for jævn glide.

images.alt: Loftmonteret skinne giver fuld gardindækning over vinduespartiet.
images.caption: Sammenhængende skinne over vinduesåbningen.

images.alt: Gardiner lagt op for ren gulvafstand og lige bundlinje.
images.caption: Oplægning for korrekt længde og pæn afslutning ved gulv.

images.alt: Beslag og plugs fordelt jævnt for stabil montering og let bevægelse.
images.caption: Plugs og beslag placeret for jævn belastning.

images.alt: Færdig installation med ensartede folder og let glide i skinnen.
images.caption: Slutresultat: fuld dækning og let glide.

story: Kunden overvejede flere løsninger. Vi valgte loftskinner for gulv-til-loft udtryk og bedre lyskontrol.
Skinnerne blev tilpasset på stedet og samlet i hjørnet; plugs/beslag placeret med passende afstand for at undgå nedbøjning.
Gardinerne var for lange, så vi lagde dem op 1–2 cm over gulvet for en ren linje og bedre glide.
Tips: vælg skinner når pladsen er trang eller du ønsker fuld højde; match stofvægt med de rigtige glidere; planlæg hjørnesamling og ‘return to wall’ ved behov for mørklægning.
Kundeanmeldelse: “Super venlig, præcist arbejde og kan komme med kort varsel. Min go-to til hverdagsting: skab, gardiner, bordben og ophæng. Kan varmt anbefales!”, Bea V.

projects.title: Custom Cargo Bike Lids – Secure Storage for Christiania Bikes
projects.summary: Reinforced handmade lids for Christiania cargo bikes. Wood or metal edge, daily-use hardware and a padlock-ready latch for safe storage on the go.

cover.alt: Handmade reinforced lid mounted on a Christiania cargo bike

images.alt: Reinforced cargo lid with inner frame and waterproof coating.
images.caption: Reinforced cargo lid with inner frame and waterproof coating.

images.alt: Dry-fit on deck before final assembly and sealing.
images.caption: Dry-fit on deck before final assembly and sealing.

images.alt: Corner bracket fixed with stainless bolts for lasting rigidity.
images.caption: Corner bracket fixed with stainless bolts for lasting rigidity.

images.alt: Inside view: lid brackets and hinge placement tested under load.
images.caption: Inside view: lid brackets and hinge placement tested under load.

images.alt: Lock latch ready for standard padlocks, practical and secure.
images.caption: Lock latch ready for standard padlocks, practical and secure.

story: The goal: turn open cargo boxes into safe storage for tools and groceries.
I built reinforced lids tailored to Christiania Bikes, with either wood or metal edges depending on preference and weight.
Hinges and a padlock-ready latch make access easy and parking secure.
Hardware and coatings are chosen for outdoor use to handle Copenhagen weather.

projects.title: Christiania cykel låg – Sikker opbevaring & håndlavet design
projects.summary: Forstærkede håndlavede låg til Christiania ladcykler. Træ- eller metalramme, beslag til daglig brug og aflåselig lukning med hængelås.

cover.alt: Håndlavet, forstærket låg monteret på Christiania ladcykel

images.alt: Forstærket låg med indvendig ramme og vandafvisende overflade.
images.caption: Forstærket låg med indvendig ramme og vandafvisende overflade.

images.alt: Prøvesamling på værkstedet før endelig montering og forsegling.
images.caption: Prøvesamling på værkstedet før endelig montering og forsegling.

images.alt: Hjørnebeslag monteret med rustfri skruer for ekstra stabilitet.
images.caption: Hjørnebeslag monteret med rustfri skruer for ekstra stabilitet.

images.alt: Indvendigt kig: hængsler og beslag testet under belastning.
images.caption: Indvendigt kig: hængsler og beslag testet under belastning.

images.alt: Låsebeslag klar til hængelås – praktisk og sikkert.
images.caption: Låsebeslag klar til hængelås – praktisk og sikkert.

story: Målet var at gøre en åben ladkasse til sikker opbevaring af værktøj og indkøb.
Jeg byggede specialtilpassede, forstærkede låg til Christiania Bikes – med træ- eller metalramme efter ønske.
Hængsler og aflåselig lukning giver nem adgang og sikker parkering.
Beslag og overflader er valgt til udendørs brug og dansk vejr.
